text:
(In reply to Chris Rees from comment #4)

# sh
# . /etc/rc.subr
# load_rc_config sendmail
# echo $sendmail_enable
NONE
# grep sendmail /etc/rc.conf
sendmail_enable="NONE"
# service -e
